engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a software product — feature grid (Business Center, Analytics, Calendar, Expenses, Mileage), pricing tiers, and FAQ carry the persuasion; not trusting a person, browsing work, or checking a place.

goal.one_action: Register for a free account in the NotaryAssist app

structure.archetype_note: Long single-scroll home with anchor sections + a secondary video-resources page; store badges + app-register CTA are the spine.

mapped.observed_as: Business Center / Auto Import / Calendar / Customers / Expenses / Mileage / Notarial Acts

proposed_new.name: app-signup
proposed_new.evidence: Every primary CTA (Get Started, Start FREE Today) routes to app.notaryassist.com/account/register — freemium self-serve SaaS where conversion is app registration, not a lead form or newsletter.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial (static WebFetch only, renderPage not run); form fields for 'Send a Testimonial'/'Ask Us A Question' under-captured, but core structure, CTAs, pricing, and proof are clear.

gap_findings: app-signup (register-into-product-app) is the true conversion but the closed vocab/engines model it only as a generic redirect; 'packages' capability captures the pricing table but not the freemium free-tier register handoff.
